d.t: Lắng nghe phản hồi tại quầy

e.p: How was your shopping today?
e.m: Nói nếu bạn hài lòng hay không. Nêu một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use Past Simple or Present Simple + because.
e.s: I was satisfied with my shopping because the staff helped me quickly.

e.p: Did you like the product you bought?
e.m: Nói có thích hay không. Mô tả một điểm bạn thích.
e.s: Yes, I liked the product. It was simple and worked well.

e.p: Was there anything wrong with the item?
e.m: Nói có vấn đề hay không. Nêu một vấn đề cụ thể nếu có.
e.s: There was a small scratch on the box. It did not affect the product, but it looked damaged.

e.p: Would you recommend this shop to a friend?
e.m: Nói có giới thiệu hay không. Cho lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use will or present simple + because.
e.s: I would recommend the shop because the prices are fair and the staff are friendly.

e.p: Any suggestion to make your visit better next time?
e.m: Đưa ra một đề nghị cụ thể. Nói ngắn vì sao.
e.h: Use should + base verb or simple suggestion phrase.
e.s: You should give clearer price labels because it will save customers time.

d.t: Khảo sát nhanh sau mua hàng

e.p: How satisfied are you with your purchase today?
e.m: Nói mức độ hài lòng (vừa/khá/không). Nêu một nguyên nhân.
e.s: I am quite satisfied because the product fits well and feels good.

e.p: Was the checkout fast?
e.m: Trả lời nhanh/chậm. Nêu một lý do ngắn.
e.s: The checkout was fast because there were enough staff at the counter.

e.p: Did you get the help you needed from staff?
e.m: Nói có được giúp hay không. Nêu ví dụ ngắn về giúp đỡ.
e.h: Use Past Simple and a short example.
e.s: Yes, I got help. A staff member showed me the right size quickly.

e.p: How likely are you to buy here again?
e.m: Nói có nhiều khả năng mua lại hay không. Cho một lý do ngắn.
e.s: I will likely buy here again because the quality was good and the price was fair.

e.p: Any quick idea to improve the store?
e.m: Đưa ra một ý cải tiến. Nói ngắn lợi ích của ý đó.
e.h: Use should + base verb or simple conditional.
e.s: You should add more sizes on the shelf because customers will find what they need faster.

d.t: Cuộc gọi hỏi thăm sau mua

e.p: Hello, we called to ask if everything is okay with your order.
e.m: Nói đơn giản mọi thứ ổn hay không. Nếu không, chỉ một vấn đề.
e.h: Use Past Simple to report order status.
e.s: Everything is okay with my order. The product arrived on time.

e.p: Did the package arrive on schedule?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nếu không, nói khi nào nó đến.
e.s: No, it was late. It arrived two days after the expected date.

e.p: Was the product as described online?
e.m: Nói đúng mô tả hay không. Nêu một khác biệt ngắn nếu có.
e.s: Yes, it matched the description. The color was the same and the size was correct.

e.p: Would you like us to help with anything else?
e.m: Nói có cần trợ giúp thêm hay không. Nếu có, nêu yêu cầu.
e.s: No, I don't need more help. Thank you for checking.

e.p: We want to improve our service. What one change would help you most?
e.m: Đưa ra một thay đổi cụ thể. Nói ngắn lý do.
e.s: You should offer faster shipping options because I often need items quickly.

e.p: Did the delivery person handle the package carefully?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nếu không, mô tả một vấn đề ngắn.
e.s: No, the delivery person was a bit careless. The box had a small dent.

e.p: Was the driver polite and helpful?
e.m: Trả lời lịch sự hay không. Nêu ví dụ ngắn.
e.h: Use Past Simple and one example.
e.s: Yes, the driver was polite and helped carry the box to my door.

e.p: Did the delivery meet your time window?
e.m: Nói có đúng giờ hay không. Nếu trễ, nói ngắn khi nó đến.
e.s: It arrived within the time window. I got it in the afternoon as expected.

e.p: Would faster delivery make you more satisfied?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, faster delivery would make me more satisfied because I need items quickly for work.

e.p: How can the delivery be better next time?
e.m: Đưa ra một đề nghị cụ thể. Nêu lợi ích ngắn.
e.h: Use should + base verb or simple conditional.
e.s: You should give a one-hour delivery window because customers will plan better.

d.t: So sánh giữa hai dịch vụ

e.p: Which service did you like more, A or B?
e.m: Nói bạn thích A hay B. Nêu một lý do ngắn.
e.s: I liked service A more because it was faster and friendlier.

e.p: Was one product better value than the other?
e.m: Nói sản phẩm nào có giá trị hơn. Nêu một điểm so sánh.
e.s: Product A was better value because it was cheaper and worked well.

e.p: Did you enjoy the atmosphere in store A or store B?
e.m: Nói nơi nào dễ chịu hơn. Mô tả một khác biệt.
e.s: Store B was more comfortable because it was quieter and cleaner.

e.p: Would you shop at the cheaper store again?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn liên quan đến giá hoặc chất lượng.
e.s: I would shop there again because prices are lower and the quality is still good.

e.p: What should the worse store do to improve?
e.m: Nêu một việc cụ thể cửa hàng kém nên làm. Nói ngắn lợi ích.
e.h: Use should + base verb and because.
e.s: They should train staff better because service would be faster and friendlier.

d.t: Đề xuất cải tiến dịch vụ

e.p: What is one small change we could make now?
e.m: Nêu một thay đổi nhỏ. Nói lợi ích ngắn.
e.s: You should place signs for sizes because customers will find items quicker.

e.p: Would clearer prices help you shop more?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, clearer prices would help because I can compare items faster.

e.p: Should we extend opening hours for busy days?
e.m: Trả lời đồng ý hay không. Nêu một lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, you should extend hours because more customers can visit after work.

e.p: How would better staff training change your visit?
e.m: Nói thay đổi sẽ như thế nào. Nêu một lợi ích cụ thể.
e.s: Better staff training would make visits faster because employees know tasks well.

e.p: If you were the manager, what is the first thing you'd change?
e.m: Nói một thay đổi đầu tiên. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use would + base verb and because.
e.s: I would improve the return policy because customers will feel more confident to buy.

d.t: Xử lý khiếu nại nhỏ tại cửa hàng

e.p: I see you returned the item. What is the problem?
e.m: Nêu vấn đề chính ngắn gọn. Nói nếu bạn muốn đổi hay hoàn tiền.
e.h: Use Past Simple and a clear request.
e.s: The shirt was too small. I want to exchange it for a larger size.

e.p: Did you buy it here or online?
e.m: Nói nơi mua. Nêu ngắn ngày mua nếu nhớ.
e.s: I bought it online last week.

e.p: Would you prefer a refund or a replacement?
e.m: Chọn hoàn tiền hoặc đổi hàng. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I prefer a replacement because I still want the same style in a bigger size.

e.p: Can we offer a small discount if you keep it?
e.m: Trả lời có giữ với giảm giá hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: No, I will not keep it because the size is wrong and I need the correct fit.

e.p: We want to avoid this again. What change should we make?
e.m: Nêu một thay đổi cụ thể. Nói ngắn lợi ích.
e.s: You should add clearer size charts because customers will choose the right size more often.

e.p: Do you have your receipt for the return?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nếu không, nói bạn có thể cung cấp thông tin nào.
e.h: Use Yes/No + or give another proof.
e.s: No, I don't have the receipt. I can give the order number instead.

e.p: Would you like store credit or cash refund?
e.m: Chọn một loại hoàn tiền. Nêu ngắn lý do.
e.s: I would like a cash refund because I need the money now.

e.p: Can we offer to exchange for a similar item?
e.m: Trả lời đồng ý hay không. Nếu có, nêu yêu cầu món tương tự.
e.s: Yes, I agree to exchange it. I want the same model in blue.

e.p: We will process the refund today. Is that okay?
e.m: Trả lời chấp thuận hay muốn khác. Nêu ngắn lý do nếu muốn khác thời gian.
e.s: Yes, that is okay. I appreciate the quick action.

e.p: Please tell us one thing to improve returns in future.
e.m: Đưa ra một đề nghị cụ thể. Nói ngắn lợi ích cho khách hàng.
e.h: Use should + base verb or simple suggestion.
e.s: You should simplify the return form because customers can finish returns faster.

d.t: Hẹn gặp quản lý để phản hồi

e.p: The manager can meet you tomorrow. Is that good?
e.m: Trả lời đồng ý hay không. Nếu không, đề xuất thời gian khác.
e.h: Use Yes/No + or offer another time.
e.s: No, tomorrow is busy. I can meet the day after tomorrow in the afternoon.

e.p: What is the main issue you want to discuss with the manager?
e.m: Nêu vấn đề chính ngắn gọn. Nêu một ví dụ cụ thể.
e.h: Use Present Simple or Past Simple + example.
e.s: I want to discuss slow service. For example, it took too long at checkout yesterday.

e.p: Would you like a phone call or a face-to-face meeting?
e.m: Chọn hình thức gặp. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I prefer a face-to-face meeting because it's easier to explain the issue.

e.p: If the manager fixes the issue, would you return as a customer?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, I would return if they fix the issue because I like the products here.

e.p: What solution would you accept from the manager?
e.m: Nêu một giải pháp chấp nhận được. Nói ngắn vì sao.
e.s: I would accept a refund or a full exchange because I want a workable product.

e.p: Would you leave a short review online about your experience?
e.m: Nói có thể để review hay không. Nếu có, nói 1 câu khen hoặc chê.
e.s: Yes, I can leave a review. The staff were friendly and helpful.

e.p: What star rating would you give us out of five?
e.m: Nói số sao. Nêu một lý do ngắn cho điểm đó.
e.s: I would give four stars because the product was good but shipping was slow.

e.p: Can you mention one thing we did well?
e.m: Nêu một điểm tốt cụ thể.
e.s: You responded to my email quickly and clearly.

e.p: Is there one thing we should improve in your review?
e.m: Đưa ra một điều cần cải thiện ngắn gọn.
e.s: You should improve delivery times so customers get items faster.

e.p: Would you change your rating if we fix the problem soon?
e.m: Trả lời có đổi hay không. Nêu ngắn điều kiện.
e.s: Yes, I would change my rating if delivery improves within a week.

d.t: Chăm sóc khách hàng qua email

e.p: Thanks for your email. Can you tell us the order number?
e.m: Cho order number hoặc nói bạn không nhớ. Nếu không nhớ, nêu thông tin thay thế.
e.h: Use Past Simple or state alternative like order date.
e.s: I don't remember the order number. I bought it on March 10 and used my card ending 1234.

e.p: We will check and reply in 48 hours. Is that okay?
e.m: Trả lời chấp nhận thời gian hay muốn nhanh hơn. Nêu lý do nếu cần nhanh.
e.s: Yes, 48 hours is okay. I can wait for your reply.

e.p: Please describe the issue in one sentence.
e.m: Viết một câu mô tả vấn đề chính.
e.h: Use Past Simple and short detail.
e.s: The screen had a scratch when I opened the package.

e.p: Would you like a refund or a repair?
e.m: Chọn hoàn tiền hoặc sửa chữa. Nêu ngắn lý do.
e.s: I would like a refund because I need a perfect item for a gift.

e.p: We may send a replacement. Can you confirm your address?
e.m: Xác nhận địa chỉ hoặc nói bạn sẽ gửi địa chỉ. Nếu gửi sau, nói khi nào.
e.s: My address is 12 Green Street, [studentCity]. I can confirm now.

d.t: Đào tạo nhân viên phục vụ

e.p: How did the staff help you today?
e.m: Nói một hành động họ đã làm giúp bạn. Nêu kết quả ngắn.
e.s: A staff member showed me product features and I chose the right one.

e.p: Was the staff polite and professional?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Cho một ví dụ ngắn.
e.h: Use Past Simple and brief example.
e.s: Yes, they were polite and offered suggestions when I asked.

e.p: What skill should staff improve most?
e.m: Nêu một kỹ năng cụ thể. Nói ngắn vì sao.
e.s: They should improve product knowledge because customers ask many questions.

e.p: Would quicker responses help customers here?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu ngắn lợi ích.
e.s: Yes, quicker responses would help because lines will move faster and customers stay happy.

e.p: If you trained a new staff member, what is the first thing you'd teach?
e.m: Nói một điều đầu tiên bạn sẽ dạy. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use would + base verb and because.
e.s: I would teach polite greetings first because good manners set a positive tone.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tổng hợp phản hồi

e.p: Tell us one positive and one negative thing about your last visit.
e.m: Nói một điểm tích cực. Nói một điểm tiêu cực.
e.h: Two short sentences: positive then negative.
e.s: The staff were friendly. The checkout line was too long.

e.p: Which change would make your next visit better?
e.m: Nêu một thay đổi cụ thể. Nói ngắn vì sao bạn cần điều đó.
e.s: You should add more cashiers because lines will be shorter and visits faster.

e.p: Would you rate our service higher if we fixed the issue?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu điều kiện ngắn.
e.s: Yes, I would rate it higher if the store fixes the long checkout times.

e.p: Please give one quick tip for new customers.
e.m: Đưa ra một mẹo ngắn cho khách mới.
e.s: Check size charts before you buy to avoid returns.

e.p: Would you come back despite one problem if staff apologized?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, I would come back because a sincere apology and fix shows care.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giải quyết vấn đề

e.p: A product was faulty. Do you want a refund or exchange?
e.m: Chọn hoàn tiền hoặc đổi hàng. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I prefer an exchange because I still want the same product in good condition.

e.p: We can send a courier tomorrow. Is that okay for you?
e.m: Trả lời đồng ý hay cần khác thời gian. Nêu ngắn đề xuất nếu cần khác.
e.s: Yes, tomorrow is fine. Please send it in the morning.

e.p: If we offer a small discount, would you keep the item?
e.m: Trả lời giữ hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn cho quyết định.
e.h: Use would + because or No + because.
e.s: No, I would not keep it because the defect affects the use.

e.p: We must report this to quality control. Can you describe the fault in one sentence?
e.m: Viết một câu mô tả lỗi chính.
e.h: Use Past Simple and short detail.
e.s: The zipper broke on the first day of use.

e.p: What one step would stop this problem for other customers?
e.m: Đưa ra một bước cụ thể. Nêu lợi ích ngắn.
e.s: You should check zippers before shipping because customers will receive items in good condition.

d.t: Ôn tập: Đề xuất cải thiện

e.p: Name one improvement that would make customers happier.
e.m: Nêu một cải tiến cụ thể. Nói ngắn lợi ích.
e.h: Use should + base verb or would + verb.
e.s: You should offer faster returns because customers will trust the store more.

e.p: Is price or quality more important to you here?
e.m: Chọn price hoặc quality. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Quality is more important to me because I want the product to last.

e.p: How could we make online information clearer?
e.m: Đưa ra một thay đổi đơn giản cho thông tin online. Nêu ngắn lợi ích.
e.s: You should add more product photos because customers can see details before buying.

e.p: Would loyalty rewards make you return more often?
e.m: Trả lời có hay không. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, loyalty rewards would make me return more because I would save money over time.

e.p: If you could change one policy now, which and why?
e.m: Nêu một chính sách cần thay đổi. Nói ngắn lý do.
e.s: I would change the return window to 30 days because customers have more time to decide.
